title: Python Backend Developer
responsibilities:
• Design, develop, and maintain backend applications using Python.
• Build and manage REST APIs for web and mobile applications.
• Write clean, scalable, and efficient code following best practices.
• Collaborate with frontend developers, testers, and product teams.
• Integrate databases and manage data storage solutions.
• Debug, troubleshoot, and optimize backend performance.
• Participate in code reviews, testing, and deployment processes.
• Maintain application security, reliability, and scalability.
• Document backend processes, APIs, and technical workflows.
• Learn and implement new tools, frameworks, and backend technologies.
college_preference: Dayananda Sagar University, BMS College of Engineering
